title: Liliom
writer: Ferenc Molnár, Robert Liebmann, Bernard Zimmer
actors: Charles Boyer, Madeleine Ozeray, Robert Arnoux
plot: Two women love the same man in a world of few prospects. In Budapest, Liliom is a "public figure," a rascal who's a carousel barker, loved by the experienced merry-go-round owner and by a young, innocent maid. The maid, Julie, los...
